name: Mariner's Curse

spell.name: Mariner's Curse
spell.success: The target becomes sickened 1. Reducing its sickened condition to 0 ends the curse.
spell.failure: The target becomes sickened 1 and can't reduce its sickened condition below 1 while the curse remains. The curse can be lifted by 4th-rank *cleanse affliction* or similar magic. Whenever the target is sickened and on the water at least a mile from shore, it is also slowed 1.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, but the target becomes sickened 2.

text: You afflict the target with the curse of the roiling, unforgiving sea. The target must attempt a Will save.
